summary.title: Prioritized Roadmap to Golden State
summary.subtitle: Summary across all Capabilities Matrix deep-dive areas. Each area has its own 3-, 6-, and 9-month roadmap in the left menu. Target: 12 months.

goldenState.title: Golden state
goldenState.description: A controllership operating model where data flows from systems of record to the general ledger and consolidation with minimal manual intervention, governed by clear ownership and competency at the right levels.
outcomes: Reinsurance Administration: Settlement and treaty accounting automated where possible; L3/L4 depth for policy and audit defense; collateral/LOC process standardized.
Investment Accounting: Clearwater–Oracle feed owned and automated; L3/L4 coverage for structured securities, derivatives, and complex valuations.
Accounting Operations & Technical Accounting: FAST–Oracle and TMS integrated; LDTI and segment reporting with audit-ready traceability.
Financial Reporting: Regulatory and consolidated reporting with full audit traceability and control evidence.
Finance Systems: Data completeness and governance embedded in close, subledger-to-GL flows, and consolidation.

phases.label: Stabilization
phases.focus: Reduce immediate restatement and key-person risk.

processes.title: JPY/F/X and treaty settlement logic fix
processes.description: Stabilize reinsurance settlement execution (currently L3 manual). Fix translation and treaty logic; document and control to reduce restatement risk.

processes.title: Intercompany and reinsurance reconciliation baseline
processes.description: Clean up intercompany and ceded/assumed reconciliation; create audit-ready baseline for treaty accounting.

processes.title: Reinsurance technical accounting (DIG B-36) documentation
processes.description: Document embedded derivative and DIG B-36 approach; reduce reliance on single point of knowledge (currently L1 manual).

processes.title: Collateral and LOC process and calendar
processes.description: Formalize collateral/LOC monitoring and renewal process to avoid BMA/NAIC compliance gaps.

phases.label: Integration
phases.focus: Automate high-volume manual work and establish data ownership.

people.title: Clearwater–Oracle feed: dedicated data owner and mapping governance
people.description: Assign data owner for Investment data flow; document and govern Clearwater-to-GL mapping to reduce restatement risk as asset classes grow.

people.title: Subledger-to-GL completeness and data ownership
people.description: Establish data ownership and completeness checks for FAST, Clearwater, and TMS flows into the GL.
people.capabilityArea: Finance Systems – Subledger-to-GL Data Flow & Completeness

processes.title: Treaty accounting automation (L2–L3 scope)
processes.description: Automate routine treaty accounting entries and settlement posting where feasible to reduce manual L2–L3 load.

systems.title: FAST-to-Oracle feed automation
systems.description: Automate policy/claims data flow from FAST to Oracle Fusion GL to reduce manual subledger-to-GL work.
systems.capabilityArea: Accounting Operations & Technical Accounting – Policy Admin (FAST → GL)

systems.title: Treasury Management System (TMS) full implementation
systems.description: Complete TMS rollout and eliminate manual cash booking and subledger gaps.
systems.capabilityArea: Accounting Operations & Technical Accounting – Cash (Treasury / TMS)

phases.label: Automation and depth
phases.focus: Expand automation and build L3/L4 competency where manual remains.

people.title: Structured securities and derivatives: L3/L4 coverage plan
people.description: Define target L3/L4 depth for OTTI, hedge accounting, and complex valuations; hire or develop and document.
people.capabilityArea: Investment Accounting – Structured Securities, Derivatives & Hedging

processes.title: LDTI reporting and actuarial–finance bridge
processes.description: Automate or standardize LDTI reporting and actuarial-to-finance bridge to remove manual restatement risk.
processes.capabilityArea: Accounting Operations & Technical Accounting – LDTI Actuarial–Finance Connection

processes.title: Consolidation and reporting workflow improvements
processes.description: Improve F/X and intercompany workflows in consolidation; strengthen balance sheet rec and reporting quality.

systems.title: Settlement workflow automation in Oracle
systems.description: Design and implement automated settlement workflows (target L4 capability) for ceded/assumed and retroceded flows.

systems.title: Clearwater–Oracle API and auto-mapping
systems.description: Implement automated mapping for new asset classes; reduce manual feed breaks and mapping errors.

phases.label: Optimization and governance
phases.focus: Touchless close, full audit traceability, and sustained governance.

people.title: Reinsurance policy and SSAP/ASC interpretation (L4)
people.description: Establish or designate L4 ownership for treaty language interpretation and policy; close audit defense gap.

people.title: Regulatory and audit evidence governance
people.description: Own regulator interactions and reporting governance; ensure audit-ready evidence for RBC/BSCR/KY RBC and external audit.
people.capabilityArea: Financial Reporting – Regulatory Reporting, External Audit

processes.title: Data completeness and governance framework
processes.description: Embed data ownership, completeness checks, and governance controls across all critical flows (FAST, Clearwater, TMS, OneStream).
processes.capabilityArea: Finance Systems – Master Data & Hierarchy Governance

systems.title: OneStream-to-Workiva pipeline
systems.description: Automate consolidation and reporting flow to Workiva for filing and audit readiness.

systems.title: Segment and adjusted operating income automation
systems.description: Automate segment analysis and AOI views for board-ready T+3 visibility.
